title: The Six ‘High’ Scoring DI Issues - 2026
summaryBody: We are fixing the six ‘high’ scoring Data Integrity issues the company has. These currently mean people’s tax may be wrong. We plan on contacting users once we’ve fixed things, so far they all appear to be via Support.
detailBody: We are fixing the six ‘high’ scoring Data Integrity issues the company has. These currently mean people’s tax may be wrong. We plan on contacting users once we’ve fixed things, so far they all appear to be via Support.
